nodes.name: Outlook Trigger
nodes.notes: SETUP: In n8n Cloud > Credentials > Add > Microsoft Outlook OAuth2. Login with khanhnguyen@zeyalabs.ai. Grant Mail.Read + Mail.Send permissions. Then copy the credential ID here.

nodes.name: Send Dashboard Notification
nodes.notes: SETUP: Uses same Microsoft OAuth2 credential as Outlook Trigger. Sends dashboard link to the original email sender (or fallback to khanhnguyen@zeyalabs.ai).
